name: Mars SolarBalls
description:
• Mars is one of the oldest characters in the solar system being 4.6 billion years old referenced in "The Rocky Planets" thus Mars would be older then the Grand Tack which surprisingly he didn't make an appearance in the Big Bang - Part 2

  • Mars is the first planet with differently-sized eyes and thus the largest planet whose eyes are different sizes and the second planet being Theia.

  • Mars is the third celestial object Astrodude has landed on after Earth and Venus.

  • Marstopher is the first celestial body to have facial hair.

  • It is scientifically predicted that Mars may have thin rings in the future, when Phoboseventually approaches Mars' Roche Limit in 30-50 million years.

    • Conversely, Deimos is slowly drifting away from Mars, and will likely eventually spiral away (leaving Mars with no moons).

    • However, it is unknown whether this will happen in the series, given that the celestial bodies in the Solar System are alive.
creator: Mars_Bar14
